Scotland's assisted dying bill rejected after emotional debateScotland would have become the first part of the UK to legalise the process had MSPs backed the proposals. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c33j3nd1kvko?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c33j3nd1kvko#0 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 00:04:34 GMT
Morocco awarded Africa Cup of Nations title after Senegal win overturnedMorocco declared the winners of the 2025 Africa Cup of Nations after the Confederation of African Football overturns the result of their final defeat by Senegal. https://www.bbc.com/sport/football/articles/ce949glzzglo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/sport/football/articles/ce949glzzglo#0 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 03:24:20 GMT
